# Tools for getting started with the Brave Search API

[![Tools for getting started with the Brave Search API OG image](/avante_6229777347894050959_hu00b63022e8df9a7db7abd469564d951e_0_1200x630_fill_box_center_3.png)

## Avante

Avante.nvim is a Neovim plugin designed to emulate the behaviour of the Cursor AI IDE.



](https://github.com/yetone/avante.nvim)[![Tools for getting started with the Brave Search API OG image](/socialPreview_10651128504889551007_hu1b30988e2748cf8cad6041f430cf650a_0_1200x630_fill_box_center_3.png)

## AWS Marketplace

AWS Marketplace is a digital catalog of software and services that can be deployed on AWS.



](https://aws.amazon.com/marketplace/seller-profile?id=seller-mmvimitjqzsyu)[![](images/default-image-1.png)

## Blaxel

Blaxel is a cloud infrastructure built for AI agents.



](https://docs.blaxel.ai/Integrations#tools-and-apis)[![Tools for getting started with the Brave Search API OG image](/2bb4WsawaKUoW0rvlxlC_2085597527892392192_hu7f53469c7710c2421a8a6e6436081094_0_1200x630_fill_box_center_3.png)

## BoltAI

BoltAI is an AI chat app for Mac, enabling seamless use of ChatGPT and other LLMs across a variety of workflows.



](https://boltai.com/docs/plugins/brave-search)[![Tools for getting started with the Brave Search API OG image](/cline_og_img_3657479775171682753_hufb590395f182efb0746a8eeb48a30173_0_1200x630_fill_box_center_3.png)

## Cline

Cline is an open-source, extensible, and autonomous coding agent for VS Code.



](https://cline.bot/)[![Tools for getting started with the Brave Search API OG image](/crew_only_logo_14615465751737687995_hu8f420eac087f6adcb0d505a9c0ad828b_0_1200x630_fill_box_center_3.png)

## CrewAI

CrewAI is an independent Python framework for building autonomous AI agents.



](https://docs.crewai.com/tools/search-research/bravesearchtool)[![](images/default-image-2.png)

## Cursor

Cursor is an AI code editor used by millions of engineers. It is powered by a series of custom models that generate more code than almost any LLMs in the world.



](https://docs.cursor.com/context/model-context-protocol)[![](images/default-image-3.png)

## DeerFlow

DeerFlow is an open-source deep research assistant.



](https://deerflow.tech/)[![Tools for getting started with the Brave Search API OG image](/wuOqS9XwiT7WjyMd0HAinp7aWo_10757112966972265619_huc6f15fa203a90d5f3f788aee09e7d95d_0_1200x630_fill_box_center_3.png)

## Dify

Dify is an open-source LLM app development platform.



](https://dify.ai/)[![](images/default-image-1.png)

## Docker Hub

Docker Hub is a container registry built for developers and open source contributors to find, use, and share their container images and access verified content.



](https://hub.docker.com/r/mcp/brave-search)[![Tools for getting started with the Brave Search API OG image](/opengraph-image_8821287434040726226_huef7ce6581a331bd584eb07a67f5bcc26_0_1200x630_fill_box_center_3.png)

## Flowise

Flowise is a low-code LLM app-building application that makes it easy to integrate and build with third-party tools like Brave Search API.



](https://flowiseai.com/)[![Tools for getting started with the Brave Search API OG image](/servers_1990269971736875284_hu0eb14d2d64a137e721e65c9b0636863c_0_1200x630_fill_box_center_3.png)

## Kiro

Kiro provides a Web Search MCP server for accessing Brave Search API results.



](https://kiro.dev/docs/mcp/servers/#web-search-server)[![](images/default-image-2.png)

## LangChain

LangChain gives developers a framework to construct LLM‑powered apps easily.



](https://python.langchain.com/docs/integrations/tools/brave_search/)[![Tools for getting started with the Brave Search API OG image](/og-image_16219831894276528331_hu72d1d41145f971260e6b586e02611d42_0_1200x630_fill_box_center_3.png)

## LlamaIndex

LlamaIndex is a leading data framework for building LLM applications.



](https://www.llamaindex.ai/)[![](images/default-image-3.png)

## MCP.so

MCP.so is a place to discover MCP servers and clients.



](https://mcp.so/server/brave-search-mcp-server)[![Tools for getting started with the Brave Search API OG image](/open-graph-image_17644917854191413416_hu84f82a97334198ca101017306450244f_0_1200x630_fill_box_center_3.png)

## Microsoft Power Platform

Microsoft Power Platform is a collection of low-code development tools that allows users to build custom business applications, automate workflows, and analyze data.



](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/connectors/bravesearch/)[![](images/default-image-1.png)

## MindMac

MindMac is an AI chat-app designed for macOS that allows users to access various AI models for productivity.



](https://mindmac.app/)[![](images/default-image-2.png)

## Postman

Postman is an API platform for developers to design, build, test, and collaborate on APIs.



](https://www.postman.com/getmcp/public-mcp-servers/collection/681e7f04440b3593597a1681)[![](images/default-image-3.png)

## PulseMCP

PulseMCP is a place to discover servers, clients, and use cases in the MCP ecosystem.



](https://www.pulsemcp.com/servers/modelcontextprotocol-brave-search)[![](images/default-image-1.png)

## Quivr

Quivr is an open source RAG framework to deploy and use AI assistants.



](https://www.quivr.com)[![Tools for getting started with the Brave Search API OG image](/home_16003101101305848599_hu1f604d8cd9826b93c625516ff3b8a79b_0_1200x630_fill_q75_box_center.jpg)

## Windsurf

Windsurf (formerly Codeium) is the world's most advanced AI coding assistant for developers and enterprises.



](https://windsurf.com/)[![Tools for getting started with the Brave Search API OG image](/og_12136750238892125501_hu601dc0a085b1f189fdbe91b89decdf85_0_1200x630_fill_box_center_3.png)

## Zed

Zed is a next-generation code editor designed for high-performance collaboration with humans and AI.



](https://zed.dev/extensions?query=brave)
